faqs.question: How do I connect Anthropic?
faqs.answer: Use your Anthropic API key from the console. Start with Claude 3.5 Sonnet for best balance of capability and speed.

faqs.question: What is the context window?
faqs.answer: Claude supports up to 200K tokens context window - process entire books, long documents, and extensive conversations.

faqs.question: Can Claude process images?
faqs.answer: Yes! Claude has vision capabilities to analyze images, extract text from screenshots, and understand visual content.

faqs.question: What about tool use?
faqs.answer: Claude can call functions and use tools dynamically. Build agentic workflows that interact with external systems.

faqs.question: How accurate is Claude?
faqs.answer: Claude excels at complex reasoning, nuanced understanding, and following detailed instructions with high accuracy.

faqs.question: What models are available?
faqs.answer: Claude 3.5 Sonnet (best), Claude 3 Opus (most capable), Claude 3 Sonnet (balanced), Claude 3 Haiku (fastest).

testimonials.quote: Claude's reasoning ability is unmatched. Handles complex legal analysis that other AI models miss.
testimonials.author: Jennifer Morrison

testimonials.quote: 200K context window changed everything. Process entire codebases and documentation in one request.
testimonials.author: Alex Chen

testimonials.quote: Vision capabilities are incredible. Extract data from any document format with perfect accuracy.
testimonials.author: Dr. Sarah Martinez

testimonials.quote: Tool use enables true agentic workflows. Claude makes decisions and takes actions autonomously.
testimonials.author: Michael Roberts

limits.title: Rate Limits
limits.description: Vary by tier and model. Higher tiers offer increased limits. Enterprise: custom limits for production scale.

limits.title: Token Limits
limits.description: 200K input tokens max, 4K output tokens. Use Claude 3 models for different speed/capability tradeoffs.

limits.title: Image Processing
limits.description: Supports common formats (PNG, JPEG, GIF, WebP). Size limits apply - optimize large images before upload.

limits.title: Streaming
limits.description: Streaming available for real-time responses. Improves user experience for long-form generation.
